case_title: ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES LLC VS. RICKEY RIESEN et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES LLC AS TO DEFENDANT RIESEN, RICKEY DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-08-2010

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RIESEN, RICKEY $1,776.25 PRINCIPAL, $322.15 INTEREST, $265.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,363.40, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 395(B); VENUE FOR PERSONAL, FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES LLC

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $265.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT RIESEN, RICKEY
DECLARATION RE: UNAVAILABILTY OF ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT; COMPUTATION OF INTEREST; NOTICE PURSUANT TO CCP 1033 (B) (2) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES LLC
